metadata.description: HTML-based code delivery workflow for Claude Code. Learner-oriented: generates step-by-step HTML guides with rich comments, copy buttons, and color diffs. Uses file-system directory management for organized output.

plugins.name: cc-htmlwf
plugins.description: Deliver code changes as interactive HTML pages with copy-paste support, green/red diffs, explanation tables, and rich Chinese comments. Designed for learners who want to review and understand changes before applying them.
